description: CI regenerates the CRDs and dist/ that a version bump implies, and pushes them back onto the Renovate branch as github-actions[bot] (see .github/workflows/ci.yaml). gitIgnoredAuthors keeps Renovate from treating that commit as a third-party modification, which would otherwise block both rebasing and automerge.

packageRules.description: package.json/bun.lock dependency bumps are handled manually via `mise run upgrade` (bun update) per CLAUDE.md's 'confirm before adding dependencies' policy - don't have Renovate open PRs for them.

Chart/CRD version bumps (the custom.regex managers below) are fully self-completing once CI pushes the regenerated CRDs + dist/, and CI synthesizes and validates the exact manifests Argo will apply. Let minor/patch automerge on green; majors still get regenerated onto the branch by CI, but wait for a human to actually look at the CRD diff before Argo applies it.

customManagers.description: Bump literal versions pinned in tools/sources.ts (velero, and the disabled cnpg/kured/sealed-secrets/system-upgrade-controller placeholders), each annotated with a `// renovate: datasource=... depName=...` comment directly above the `value` field.

Bump the app-const chart/release versions in apps/cert-manager/app.ts and apps/metrics/app.ts that tools/sources.ts derives its CRD versions from (VersionSource kind 'app-const'). Annotated the same way as the literal versions in tools/sources.ts.
